text.title: Match Real World Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is the audience domain-experts who require precise vocabulary?

conclusion.verdict: apply with domain-expert override: preserve precise vocabulary; flag over-simplification as a finding.

branch.question: Is the user-vocabulary corpus reachable (tickets / transcripts / search logs)?

conclusion.verdict: apply: produce the language audit with cited substitutions; run consistency pass.
defer until corpus is reachable; substitutions without citations are team preference.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, audience is general users, ticket corpus reachable → produce findings per r1-user-vocabulary and run consistency pass per r2-consistent-substitution.
